title: AbioticDepletionMineralsAndMetalsElementResult
description: AbioticDepletionMineralsAndMetalsElementResult: Result class for resulting Abiotic depletion - minerals & metals for a particular Element.

A1.description: Resulting Abiotic depletion - minerals & metals relating to the Raw Material Supply module in the Product stage. Property has a quantity of type AbioticDepletionMineralsAndMetals meassured in [kg Sb eq].
